name: Thistleleaf Necklace
description: Notes One of the few rings capable of directly harming enemies, this one provides a fair amount of HP and DEF while also firing two counterattacks at the enemy that dealt the hit that triggered it in an attempt of self-defense.
effects: On Hit: Retaliates with a 150 damage lingering spore. On Shoot while In Combat: Retaliates with a 175 damage + 75 damage over 4 second bleed Cooldown: 1.6 seconds
Shots are parametric Shots pass through obstacles Ignores defense of target
Bleeding on enemies for 4 seconds. (Bleed Damage: 75) Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles Ignores defense of target
